title: Liverpool City Council: Letter to the chair of the Liverpool Improvement and Assurance Board (19 December 2024)
body: "A copy of the letter from the Minister to Mike Cunningham CBE QPM responding to the progress report received in October 2024.  The Minister welcomes the continued progress and asks for a further update in March 2025, including on the Council’s longer-term plans of continuous improvement, including through external support and challenge. "
